description: AI design tool with multi-variant parallel generation, direct-manipulation element editing, URL-to-design-system extraction, voice input, and multi-breakpoint preview wall.
features: 3 parallel variant generation with editorial, minimal, and utility direction seeds
Direct-manipulation element editing via iframe postMessage click capture
URL → design system extraction (server-side fetch + gpt-4o-mini CSS analysis)
Voice brief input with whisper-1 transcription + gpt-4o-mini brief extraction
Multi-breakpoint preview wall: desktop, tablet, iPhone 15, Pixel 7 with device frames
5 pre-baked design systems: Linear, Stripe, Apple, Soft Warm, Editorial Monocle
Supabase-backed generation history with iteration tree
